name: arn-code
description: Structured, artifact-driven development pipeline for Codex. Plan, implement, review, and ship features with three ceremony tiers.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, implement, review, and ship code changes.
interface.longDescription: Arness Code provides an artifact-driven development pipeline for Codex. It preserves specs, plans, task lists, reviews, and shipping records under .arness while guiding work through swift, standard, and thorough ceremony tiers.
defaultPrompt: Plan a feature or fix with Arness Code.
Review and ship this Arness change.
